name: task-loop
description: Task-loop setup, preflight, specify-aims, create-cycle scaffolding, and manual run-cycle support for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Setup, proposal aims, create-cycle scaffolding, and manual run-cycle support for task-loop in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Task Loop to configure the hosted Supabase task board, save local credentials, register a repository, verify setup, author the initial proposal with specify-aims, create-cycle scaffolding, sync the task_loop_cycle_worker custom agent, and run a conservative manual Codex controller pass. Full unattended Codex scheduling remains pending.
defaultPrompt: Set up task-loop for this repo.
Sync the task-loop Codex cycle worker agent.
Specify aims for this task-loop project.
Create cycle scaffolding for this task-loop project.
Run one Codex task-loop controller pass.
